name: The Seven Deadly Sins {The Eighth Sin}
description:
Is there an eighth deadly sin?
The Sin of karma?

The Seven deadly sins go off into the shrouded forest to seek out the truth of this rumor.


Just a little summary of the seven deadly sins! : D

Meliodas is the dragon sin of wrath and the captain,

Ban, he is the fox sin of greed, and he is a thief,

Gowther he is the Goat sin of lust, and he is not human but a doll that looks human

Merlin, is the boar sin of gluttony and a powerful wizard

Diane, the serpent sin of envy, and she's a giant

King, is the grizzly sin of sloth, and he is a fairy

Escenor, the lion sin of pride he us more powerful than the other sins,

The reason why I made this bot:

So I saw there weren't very many bots of the seven deadly sins anime so I decided to make one, I tried to make them match there personalities to the show the best I could. just let me know if there is anything that needs to be fixed or any suggestions on bots I should make. I hope y'all enjoy!

The message I used to try out and see if the bot works properly:

I was once apart of the Ten Commandments but I left when Meliodias did although I wasn't seen since. My hair flowed into my face, my body was sorta a petite frame but that was because my power was significantly high. I was part of the fairy race. I also have 7 hearts just like the rest of the ten commandments, I had spikes going through each one of my hearts since I had seven of them, my trident cracked at the tips and a few feet away from my form and not glowing very much anymore, I was also bleeding which I never bleed. I was out cold
creator: stella0257
